name: leakguard
description: Local-first secret redaction engine for LLM chat UIs

scripts.test: npm run lint:unused && npm run deadcode && npm run prepare:build && node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.test:fast: npm test && node tests/productization.test.js && node tests/security.test.js && node tests/build_targets.test.js
scripts.qa:browser: npm run build:chrome && node tests/browser/extension_qa_harness.test.mjs && node tests/browser/chrome_smoke.test.mjs && node tests/browser/edge_smoke.test.mjs && npm run build:firefox && node tests/browser/firefox_smoke.test.mjs
scripts.qa:browser:full: npm run build:chrome && node tests/browser/extension_qa_harness.test.mjs --full-matrix && node tests/browser/chrome_smoke.test.mjs && node tests/browser/edge_smoke.test.mjs && npm run build:firefox && node tests/browser/firefox_smoke.test.mjs
scripts.test:browser-gates: node scripts/check-browser-environment.mjs && npm run smoke:chrome && npm run smoke:firefox && npm run smoke:edge && npm run qa:browser && node tests/browser/extension_qa_harness.test.mjs
scripts.test:nightly: npm run test:fast && npm run test:release-gates && npm run test:browser-gates
scripts.test:release: npm test && npm run docs:check-links && npm run qa:browser
scripts.package:release: node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome --release-dir artifacts/release && node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome-enterprise --release-dir artifacts/release && node scripts/package-extension.mjs firefox --release-dir artifacts/release && node scripts/package-extension.mjs firefox-enterprise --release-dir artifacts/release
scripts.release:artifacts: npm run release:clean && npm run build:all && npm run package:release && npm run release:checksums
scripts.test:release-gates: npm run build:all && npm run package:release && npm run test:release-artifacts && npm run bench:file-extraction
